title: An Act appropriating $950,000 from the Virgin Islands Lottery as a contribution to the General Fund of the Treasury of the Government of the Virgin Islands
text:
ACTNO.8 905
BILL NO. 35-0357
THIRTY-FIFTH LEGISLATURE OF THE VIRGIN ISLANDS
Regular Session
2024
An Act providing an appropriation from the Virgin Islands Lottery as a contribution to the
General Fund oftheTreasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands in the fiscal yearOctober
1, 2024, through September 30, 2025
---0---
Be it enacted by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands:
SECTION 1. Notwithstanding 32 V.I.C. § 246(a)(1l), the sum of $950,000 is
appropriated from the Virgin Islands Lottery in the fiscal year October 1, 2024, through
September 30, 2025, as a contribution to the General Fund ofthe Treasury ofthe Government
ofthe Virgin Islands.
Thus passed by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands on September 27, 2024.
Witness our Hands and Seal of the Legislature of the Virgin Islands this 30’/4clay of
September, AD., 2024.
Novélle E. Francis,
President
Secretary

______
Bill No. 35- 0357 is hereby approved.
Witness my hand and the Seal ofthe Government of
the United States Virgin Islands at Charlotte Amalie,
St. Thomas, This ofOctober, 2024 A.B.
Governor
